name: ExtensionBiologicallyDerivedProduct_ProcessingFacility
title: R5: Processing facilities responsible for the labeling and distribution of this biologically derived product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.processingFacility` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BiologicallyDerivedProduct.processingFacility` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.processingFacility` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.processingFacility` has a context of BiologicallyDerivedProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `BiologicallyDerivedProduct`.
Element `BiologicallyDerivedProduct.processingFacility` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Processing facilities responsible for the labeling and distribution of this biologically derived product (new)
